text:
Created attachment 210937
svn diff for x11/nvidia-driver

Updates for several NVIDIA drivers are available.
This PR affects following ports:
x11/nvidia-driver     -> 440.44 
x11/nvidia-driver-390 -> 390.132
x11/nvidia-driver-340 -> 340.108

Note: all three ports need to be updated, because of shared dependencies.
